(also, **Torady**) is a village and municipality in the [Astara Rayon](/wiki/Astara_Rayon "Astara Rayon") of [Azerbaijan](/wiki/Azerbaijan "Azerbaijan"). It has a population of 820.

**Toradi** (also, **Torady**) is a village and municipality in the [Astara Rayon](/wiki/Astara_Rayon "Astara Rayon") of [Azerbaijan](/wiki/Azerbaijan "Azerbaijan"). It has a population of 820.
